name: Version History panel opens with saved versions
description: On the Editor tab, clicking the History button opens the Version History panel showing the title 'سجل التغييرات'.

planSteps.description: Verify the text 'NEXUS' is visible in the header
Click the button with title 'سجل التغييرات' in the editor toolbar
Verify the text 'سجل التغييرات' is visible in the opened panel
